data.description:
## Context / Problem

The `criteria eval` CLI admits only plan-review ids: its preflight rejects anything not in
`plan_review.registry.by_id(repo_root)` (`src/rebar/_cli/_llm_eval_commands.py:143-155`), so an
activated project **code-review** criterion is refused as "unknown" before the (now gate-aware)
eval resolver is ever reached. Fifth of five seams (root cause on superseded bug 8a4b).

## Approach

Extend the preflight to admit code-review ids and to resolve the target gate deterministically:

- Look the id up in BOTH the plan-review effective registry and the code-review effective registry
  (`code_review.registry.effective_criteria(repo_root)`,
  `src/rebar/llm/code_review/registry.py:179-184`).
- Admit iff present in **exactly one** gate; dispatch to the gate-aware calibrate path landed on
  the eval child (`calibrate_criterion` code-review branch [rebar:8153-e9b5-5706-49c8]).
- If the id is active in **both** gates, reject as **ambiguous** with a message telling the author
  which gates claim it; if in neither, keep the existing "unknown" error.
- Update the subparser help text to include a code-review example alongside the plan-review one.

**Rejected alternative.** Adding a `criteria eval --gate` flag — heavier UX for a rare case; the
"active in exactly one gate ⇒ resolve there" rule covers the common path and only genuine
cross-gate ambiguity needs operator input.

## Scope

- `src/rebar/_cli/_llm_eval_commands.py` — dual-registry admission, one-gate resolution, ambiguity
  rejection, help text.
- `tests/unit/test_code_review_project_criteria.py` — extend the shared file (reuses child 2's
  synthetic-repo fixture).

## Testing

- Happy path (cli): a project code-review id active in one gate is admitted and dispatched (exit 0
  path); the command reaches the calibrate call.
- Edge: an unknown id is rejected with the "unknown" message (exit 1).
- Edge: an id activated in BOTH gates is rejected as ambiguous (exit 1), message names both gates.

Tier: unit — invoke the command handler with a synthetic-repo `repo_root`, calibrate stubbed.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] A one-gate project code-review id is admitted and dispatched to the code-review calibrate
      path; verified by
      `rtk .venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_code_review_project_criteria.py -k cli`.
- [ ] An unknown id and a both-gates-ambiguous id are each rejected with a distinct, clear message;
      verified by the same `-k cli` selector.
data.title: Admit one-gate project code-review ids in the criteria eval CLI
